nasb.text: He did evil in the sight of the Lord; he did not depart all his days from the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, which he made Israel sin.

esv.text: And he did what was evil in the sight of the Lord. He did not depart all his days from all the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, which he made Israel to sin.

cnv.text: 他行耶和華看為惡的事，他在位的日子，沒有轉離尼八的兒子耶羅波安使以色列人陷於罪中的那些罪。

ccb.text: 他做耶和华视为恶的事，一生没有离开尼八的儿子耶罗波安使以色列人犯的那些罪。
